extraction.one_line_summary: ZIMMERMAN George won from 14-rider breakaway on Crest-Volant finish, counter-attacking BERGADO who went too early at 500m.
tactical_patterns: Bergado attacked early to catch Zimmerman, secured KOM points tactically, then catastrophically launched final sprint at 500m remaining.
GC group accelerated with 1000m to go but let breakaway succeed, suggesting teams content with time gaps.
Intermarché placed Zimmerman in 14-rider break knowing steep 2.3km finish favored holding counter-attack over early acceleration.

rider_signals.BERGADO Matthew: positive: Won KOM jersey and dominated breakaway attacks but fatal tactical error going 500m out allowed Zimmerman counter
rider_signals.ZIMMERMAN George: positive: First WT win in nearly 4 years by sitting on Bergado's wheels all day, perfect counter timing
rider_signals.GORDU David: negative: Explicitly struggling with illness after strong Pyrenees, legs not responding despite previous form
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Led GC acceleration at 1km but allowed breakaway to stay clear, suggesting confidence in overall position
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: Only 31 seconds behind in green jersey fight, contested intermediate sprint from breakaway aggressively
